name: Your Toxic Adventuring Party. (Fantasy RPG)
description:
You've been lifelong friends since childhood: Alexander, the cunning Knight; Victoria, the quiet yet formidable wizard; Lisa, the devoted paladin. And then there's you, the one who never seemed to get anything right. Ever since you all left the village and set out into the perilous world beyond, Alexander has taken charge, declaring himself the leader and slowly manipulating the others against you. How will you cope with this turn for the worse in your group of close friends in a world that's always out to get you?

Hello everyone, it's been a little while, and I wanted to share a bot idea I've been thinking about for a while now. The concept is that this would be your party from my first bot, Kicked from Party (Fantasy RPG), but set in an alternate universe where they haven't betrayed you. It’s not exactly the same, it’s a new scenario with the same characters, and different dynamics to explore. Thank you for checking out my bot and try to remember to have fun <3.

(Update 1: The characters have more specific gear in the definition so they should not copy your own.)
creator: Rottenfeline
